title: Fresh Food VR
description: A resource pack that adds 3D food models and eating animations tailored for Vivecraft!
body:
# Fresh Food for Vivecraft

**A port of [Fresh Food](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-food) by Cyber, made visually compatible with [Vivecraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/vivecraft).**

---

## 🍎 About the Original Pack

> *"This resource pack transforms every food item in the game into custom 3D models from the ground up, giving them some much-needed flair. By default, the GUI models will remain 2D, making it compatible with other resource packs like Animated Textures. But if you'd rather use the 3D GUI version, it's available in the download options!"*

> *"On top of that, there are also unique eating animations for every food! Apples are eaten from around, fish have bones underneath, and much more for you to see. (…or rather eat)"*

> *"In the newest update there are also new nameable variants for all food types so you can display them in an item frame and make it look like the food is really on your table."*

---

## 🥽 Vivecraft Compatibility

This version ensures all custom food models are rendered correctly in **Vivecraft's VR environment**, maintaining full immersion when eating and holding items.

---

## ⬇️ Pack Options
* Recommended to install [Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) to toggle 3d dropped item models along with outlines.
* For 1.20.1, 1.21, 1.21.1 you need [Pommel](https://modrinth.com/mod/pommel-held-item-models), [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn), and [Eating Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation) otherwise it will not work. 
**On Forge and NeoForge for those versions, [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector) must be installed as well.**

---
